title: BEM-846 route protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:25 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem845_create_agreed_protocol_from_claude.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
protocol_path=prev.get('protocol','governance/protocols/BEM845_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
protocol_text=read(protocol_path)
created_files=[]
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='protocol_approved_continue_implementation'
    next_action='continue implementation under BEM-845 protocol'
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED','UNKNOWN']:
    status='protocol_needs_next_claude_round'
    msg=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem846_protocol_next_round_to_claude.md')
    msg.write_text('# BEM-846 | Protocol next round to Claude'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'Please review BEM-845 protocol and return final Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Focus only on concrete changes required to make the multi-agent development protocol operational. No issue comments.'+sep+sep+'## Current protocol'+sep+protocol_text[:5000]+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_claude_protocol_review_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 request Claude final review of BEM-845 protocol','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(msg),str(q)]
    next_action='fresh tick, verify Claude final review response, then finalize protocol'
else:
    status='protocol_route_unknown'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-845 decision'
state={'bem':'BEM-846','status':status,'decision':decision,'protocol':protocol_path,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem846_route_protocol_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem846_route_protocol_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-846 | Route Protocol Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-846'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem846_route_protocol_decision.json','governance/reports/bem846_route_protocol_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed BEM-845 protocol decision; if not approved, sent protocol back to Claude for the next review round and queued dispatcher')
"""
No issue comments.
